raw_output:
PR #4 correctness review (Codex CLI 0.145.0, gpt-5.6-sol, read-only sandbox, head 88aee5f).

Verbatim: "Findings list: empty. Overall assessment: No correctness defects found. Workflow inputs, pyproject configuration, new tests - including fake_run - and plan touch-set are consistent; scripts/review_gate.py changes are AST-equivalent formatting only. Ruff and mypy checks pass. Full pytest execution was unavailable in the read-only review environment because pytest/coverage require temporary writes."

--- Post-review delta note (orchestrator, attested at final head 7950a47) ---
Single-round battery on 88aee5f converged (zero blocking findings across all
four legs). The validated non-blocking findings were then fixed and committed
as 7950a47: GITLEAKS_VERSION/lycheeVersion pinned in-diff, gitleaks range-scan
comment corrected, coverage floor 95->99 to match its rationale (measured
100%), lychee implicit-token and mypy-scope notes added, pip-audit cooldown
comment, wave-plan prose matched to shipped mechanisms, threat-model impact
rewritten to record the checksum-unverified scanner downloads and floating
transitives as accepted dev-scoped residuals (no path to skill consumers -
enforcement runs through the stdlib-only gate job, ruleset, and human
escalation on workflow changes). Local verification on the fixed head:
58 tests pass, 100% branch coverage (floor 99 enforced), ruff check/format
clean, mypy strict clean, workflow YAML parses, git diff --check clean.
The attested hash covers the fixed state. This PR touches
.github/workflows/ci.yml and therefore escalates to Kristov for merge
regardless of battery outcome. Second delta (ed4a9bf, hash updated): the touch-set gate caught decisions.txt (Kristov's local never-commit scratch file) swept into the fix-batch commit by git add -A; removed from tracking, staging is explicit-path from here on. Removal-only change, no reviewed content altered.
